channel.title: Talks on Abhiram R
channel.description: Recent content in Talks on Abhiram R

item.title: Streaming Real-Time AI Inference Results into MongoDB
item.description:
I’m going to be presenting a talk at a Mongo DB User group meetup later today and I thought I’d write about it so that it would -

  • serve as reading material for folks wanting to go through the content of my talk later
  • let everyone else know what this is all about.

Let me pre-emptively say, I don’t know why I chose this to be the “TITLE” of the talk. It is extremely dry. But the topic is actually a lot of fun!
